name: @chbrain/khai-engine-capital
description: khai engine content, the capital domain: field position by configuration of capital
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: field position by configuration of capital

card.wire: Link the field's dominant forms of capital and the scene's conversion rates to the anchor.
card.issue: What is this persona's configuration across economic, cultural, and social capital in this field?
card.require: Each persona links a capital expression under Projection.
card.enforce: Do not conflate capital as field position with capital as accumulated pieces; the pieces engine (heritage) holds what the persona has inherited, this engine holds where that puts them in the field.
card.setup: Identify which forms of capital the field rewards before assigning expressions.
